basic_details.job_title: MPKV Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Phule Krishi Vidyapeeth (MPKV) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of MPKV. has been announced through the MPKV Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess Ph.D or Master’s Degree in Statistics with preferred NET/SLET/SET qualification, along with research/teaching/extension experience and publications in ISSN journals, are eligible to apply for these Assistant Professor vacancies. The offline application process for MPKV Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 has started on 05 May 2026 and will remain open until

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D or Master's degree in Statistics
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Dept. of Agril Statistics, PGI): Ph.D or Master's degree in Statistics. NET/SLET/SET qualified preferred. Two years of experience in research, teaching, or extension education. Minimum two publications in recognized journals having ISSN Number. Short notes/short communications will not be considered. Retired Professors from Government Colleges are also eligible.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MPKV Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MPKV Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the MPKV Assistant Professor recruitment is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or Master's degree in Statistics. NET/SLET/SET qualification is preferred. Two years of research/teaching/extension experience and minimum two publications in ISSN journals are also required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 500/- for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories. Specific details regarding fees for other categories, if any, should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Professor post is in the range of Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 45,000/- per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the MPKV Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Are retired professors eligible to apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, retired professors from Government Colleges are eligible to apply for the Assistant Professor post as per the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of Mahatma Phule Krishi Vidyapeeth?
faq.answer: The official website of Mahatma Phule Krishi Vidyapeeth is where you can find more information and download the application form. Please refer to the 'Important Links' section for the direct link.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with a Master's degree without NET/SLET/SET apply?
faq.answer: Yes, Master's degree candidates without NET/SLET/SET can apply, but their remuneration will be subject to a deduction as per university guidelines, likely Rs. 25,000/- per month for contractual basis.
